name: Advanced Herbalism
description: +50% to amount of goods produced in the Herb Garden.

name: Alarm Bells
description: All workers have a +5% higher chance of producing double yields for every 110 points of expected corruption per minute in the Ancient Hearth.

name: Back to Nature
description: Increases yields by 100% in all buildings that use fertile soil. You will lose all stored food (cooked and raw) upon choosing this cornerstone.

name: Baptism of Fire
description: Every 3 burnt Blightrot Cysts lowers Hostility by 10. While the Hearth is corrupted, you're unable to sacrifice resources.

name: Bed and Breakfast
description: Gain 10 Amber every time a trader arrives.

name: Biscuit Diet
description: Farmers have a +100% chance of producing double yields when under the effect of biscuits.

name: Blightrot Pruner
description: Gain 5 Eggs when a Blightrot Cyst appears in your settlement.

name: Blood Price Contract
description: Gain 10 Amber every time a villager dies or leaves.

name: Bone Tools
description: Gain 5 Tools every time a villager leaves or dies.

name: Book of Water
description: For every 30 vein charges mined, rainwater production and all recipes using rainwater gain a 5% higher chance of producing double yields.

name: Borrowed Time
description: Grants an Active Ability that removes 1 Impatience Point at the cost of 10 Amber. Usable from the Main Warehouse, up to 5 times.

name: Bread Peels
description: Bakery production is 50% quicker.

name: Burnt to a Crisp
description: Gain 20 Coal for every 3 burned Blightrot Cysts.

name: Calming Water
description: Hostility is reduced by 10 points every time you use 150 units of water in Rain Engines.

name: Calming the Forest
description: Every Glade Event solved by making a decision marked as Empathy lowers Hostility by 40. This effect is retroactive.

name: Cannibalism
description: Gain 40 Meat every time a villager dies or leaves.

name: City of Wonders
description: Gain 1 Frog villager for every 2 house upgrades.

name: Clay Delivery Line
description: 3 Clay per minute. Not affected by production bonuses and does not contribute to production-based perks.

name: Cooking Steam
description: Food production speed is increased by +15% for every 50 units of Drizzle Water stored.

name: Copper Extractor
description: Gain 1 Copper Ore for every 5 Wood produced. All Crystalized Dew production is reduced by 1.

name: Counterfeit Amber
description: Gain 10 Amber every time you use 50 units of water in Rain Engines.

name: Crowded Caravans
description: Each newcomer group has 2 additional villagers.

name: Crowded Houses
description: All houses have room for 1 more villager.

name: Crystal Cathode
description: Production bonuses in Rain Engines are stronger (+75% production speed, +33% double yield chance), but Blightrot Cysts will appear 20% faster when using Rain Engines.

name: Deep Pockets
description: Receive 10 Amber for every 5 completed trade routes.

name: Deserted Caravans
description: Global production speed is 33% faster, but traders will arrive 50% slower.

name: Dual Carriage System
description: Two rainpunk hauling carts will be assigned to the Main Warehouse to help transport resources between buildings.

name: Dye Extractor
description: Gain 5 Dye for every 10 Insects produced.

name: Economic Migration
description: Newcomers will arrive 15% quicker and bring 10% more goods for every 1 level of standing you have with other settlements on trade routes. Retroactive.

name: Exploration Contract
description: Gain 20 Reed and 20 Clay for each discovered glade.

name: Exploration Expedition
description: Global Resolve is boosted by +5 for 180 seconds every time a new glade is discovered, but woodcutting is 25% slower until you open at least 2 glades.

name: Export Specialization
description: Gain +1 to production yields for all packs of goods.

name: Family Gratitude
description: Get 40 Waterskins for every full Reputation Point obtained through high Resolve.

name: Farming Tools
description: +50% to amount of goods produced in the Small Farm.

name: Farsight
description: Each discovered small glade increases the working speed of scouts investigating Glade Events by 50% for 180 seconds.

name: Festering Wounds
description: Bats gain +2 Resolve for every 2 Frog villagers that leave or die. Global Resolve drops 30% faster.

name: Fiber Delivery Line
description: 3 Plant Fiber per minute. Not affected by production bonuses and does not contribute to production-based perks.

name: Fiery Wrath
description: Resources you sacrifice in the Ancient Hearth burn 5% longer for every Impatience Point you have.

name: Filling Dish
description: Porridge production increases by +1 for every 150 units of Drizzle Water produced.

name: Firekeeper's Armor
description: Allows firekeepers to combat corruption more efficiently. Every burned cyst removes an additional 50 corruption.

name: Firekeeper's Prayer
description: Glade event work speed increased by 30%. Resources you sacrifice in the Ancient Hearth burn 25% quicker.

name: Firelink Ritual
description: Every villager with their need for religion fulfilled decreases the forest's Hostility by 5.

name: Flame Amulets
description: Hostility from woodcutters is decreased by 4.

name: Forge Trip Hammer
description: Parts (★★★) can be produced in the Smithy.

name: Free Samples
description: Gain 1 Parts every time you sell goods worth 25 Amber.

name: Frequent Caravans
description: Impatience grows 30% slower for 180 seconds every time you finish a trade route.

name: Frequent Patrols
description: Every Glade Event solved by making a decision marked as Loyalty lowers Hostility by 10. Retroactive.

name: Friendly Relations
description: Boosts Global Resolve by 1 for every 3 levels of standing with other settlements in trade routes. Retroactive.

name: Friends of the Forest
description: Beaver villagers do not increase Hostility.

name: From the Ashes
description: Gain 2 Wildfire Essence for every 2 completed Dangerous or Forbidden Glade Events.

name: Fungal Guide
description: Mushroom production increases by +1 every 25 times it's produced.

name: Generous Gifts
description: Newcomers bring 40% more goods with them for every Hearth level gained.

name: Generous Rations
description: Global Resolve is increased by 5, but the chance of villagers consuming twice the amount of food during a break is increased by +50%.

name: Giant Vegetables
description: +2 to Vegetables production (from gathering, farming, fishing, or production).

name: Golden Marrow
description: Gain 2 Amber for every 20 Sea Marrow produced.

name: Grain Bags
description: Grain production increases by +1 every 25 times it's produced.

name: Grain Delivery Line
description: 3 Grain per minute. Not affected by production bonuses and does not contribute to production-based perks.

name: Guild Catalogue
description: Traders will have 1 more perk or blueprint for sale.

name: Hauling Cart
description: An automated rainpunk cart will be assigned to every warehouse in the settlement to help transport resources between buildings.

name: Hidden Reward
description: Gain 1 Ancient Tablet for every 2 completed Glade Events. Retroactive.

name: Hidden from the Queen
description: No Impatience penalty when villagers leave or die, but Impatience grows 500% faster starting from Drizzle year 10.

name: Hunter-Gatherers
description: All gathering camp production is increased by 100%, but all buildings that use fertile soil have their yields decreased by 50%.

name: Improvised Tools
description: Discovering a glade during the Storm grants 10 Tools.

name: Industrialized Agriculture
description: +50% to amount of goods produced in the Forester's Hut.

name: Large Baskets
description: +50% to amount of goods produced in the Plantation.

name: Large Berry Baskets
description: +2 to Berries production (from gathering, farming, fishing, or production).

name: Leather Gloves
description: +2 to Reed production (from gathering, farming, fishing, or production).

name: Leftover Crops
description: Gain 2 Pack of Provisions for every 10 Herbs produced.

name: Local Taxes
description: Gain 12 Amber for every 50 Ale produced.

name: Lost Supplies
description: Gain 40 Meat and 40 Grain for each completed Dangerous or Forbidden Glade Event.

name: Lost in the Wilds
description: Gain one villager every time you discover a new glade.

name: Lumber Tax
description: Gain 1 Amber for every 50 Wood produced.

name: Mark of the Sealed Ones
description: At the start of each Storm, if you have at least 500 points of expected corruption per minute, gain a permanent 33% bonus to the burning time of resources sacrificed in the Ancient Hearth.

name: Market Shift Plan
description: Every neighboring town offers +2 more trade routes, but no trader will arrive until you complete at least 3 trade routes.

name: Master Blueprint
description: Unlocks the advanced blueprints for the Foragers', Trappers', and Herbalists' Camps, but gathering speed is decreased by 50% until you use up at least 250 gathering node charges.

name: Meat Specialization
description: Meat production increases by +1 every 25 times it's produced.

name: Metallurgic Proficiency
description: Increases the production speed of Copper Bars, Crystalized Dew, and all recipes that use metal ingots by +33%.

name: Mist Piercers
description: The content of glades will be revealed, but each discovered glade increases the Queen's Impatience by 0.5.

name: Moldy Grain Seeds
description: Gain 3 Mushrooms for every 10 Grain produced.

name: Moss Broccoli Seeds
description: Vegetables (★★) can now be produced in the Greenhouse.

name: Mushroom Seedlings
description: All farms can plant mushrooms (★★) on farm fields during drizzle season.

name: No Quality Control
description: Gain +2 to wood production. After each storm, all stored wood is removed, and you get 50 Insects in return.

name: Obsidian Runestone
description: The Ancient Hearth's resistance to corruption is increased by 400.

name: Old Fedora Hat
description: Increases the chance of doubling event loot by 50% (this doesn't apply to perks and blueprints).

name: Over-Diligent Woodworkers
description: Gain 3 Barrels for every 10 Planks produced.

name: Overexploitation
description: Global gathering speed is increased by 30%, and newly discovered gathering nodes have more charges. For every 40 charges used, 1 Blightrot Cyst spawns.

name: Overzealous Architects
description: Every time you fully upgrade 3 Frog Houses, you will receive a random blueprint. After 4 blueprints, this cornerstone will disappear.

name: Peasant Supplies
description: Receive 3 Pack of Provisions for every new villager.

name: Prayer Book
description: Scouts work 10% faster on Glade Events for every firekeeper assigned to a Hearth.

name: Prosperous Archaeology
description: Every time you open or send 2 Abandoned Caches to the Citadel, you gain +1 to Global Resolve.

name: Prosperous Settlement
description: Gain +1 to Global Resolve every time you sell goods worth 50 Amber, but scouts work 10% slower on Glade Events.

name: Protected Trade
description: Hostility is reduced by 15 points every time you sell goods worth 30 Amber, but Complex Food needs grant 1 less Resolve Point.

name: Queen's Gift
description: Every time you complete an order, a small abandoned cache will appear in your settlement.

name: Rain Pumps
description: Brewery production is 50% quicker.

name: Rebellious Spirit
description: Gain +1 Global Resolve for every 2 Impatience Points. Every time a villager leaves or dies, Impatience is increased by an additional 0.2 points.

name: Reckless Plunder
description: Increases the chance of doubling loot from abandoned caches by 100% (excluding perks and blueprints).

name: Reinforced Axes
description: Woodcutters' Camp production is 35% quicker.

name: Repurposed Bait
description: Gain 2 Insects for every 1 piece of bait used in fishing.

name: Rich Glades
description: Newly discovered gathering nodes have more charges: +5 for small ones, +15 for large ones.

name: Root Delivery Line
description: 3 Roots per minute. Not affected by production bonuses and does not contribute to production-based perks.

name: Rooty Ground
description: Wood production is increased by +1, but harvesting and planting are 25% slower.

name: Royal Guard Training
description: Fulfilling the need for Brawling grants an additional +5 to Resolve, but attacking a trader adds 2 extra Impatience Points.

name: Safe Haven
description: Hostility is reduced by 40 for every Hearth upgraded to Neighborhood (Level 2) or higher.

name: Sahilda's Secret Cookbook
description: Gain 10 Jerky for every 10 Pie produced.

name: Secure Perimeter
description: Completing a Forbidden Event reduces the Hostility gained from Dangerous and Forbidden Glades by 2, and from Small Glades by 1. Retroactive.

name: Sharp Sickles
description: +2 to Herbs production (from gathering, farming, fishing, or production).

name: Silent Looting
description: Every time you open or send an Abandoned Cache to the Citadel, Hostility is lowered by 15 points.

name: Small Distillery
description: Gain 4 Crystalized Dew for every 20 Resin produced.

name: Small Press
description: Gain 3 Oil for every 10 Flour produced.

name: Spices
description: Herb and Root production is increased by +1 for every 75 Biscuits produced.

name: Spirit of Cooperation
description: Beavers gain +2 Resolve for every Reputation Point gained through Harpy Resolve. Retroactive.

name: Steel Focus
description: Gain +8% global production speed for every Bat working in a building with the Metallurgy specialization.

name: Steel Mattocks
description: Stone (★★) can now be produced in the Clay Pit.

name: Steel Pickaxes
description: +2 to Stone production (from gathering, farming, fishing, or production).

name: Steel Shovels
description: +2 to Clay production (from gathering, farming, fishing, or production).

name: Stormwalker Tax
description: Gain 15 Amber every time you accept a newcomer group from the Citadel, but you'll lose all stored Amber upon choosing this cornerstone.

name: Stormwalker Training
description: All trade routes are faster by 40%.

name: Strength in Numbers
description: Global Resolve drops 2% slower for every Frog villager.

name: Surprise Child
description: Gain 1 Lizard for every 25 Eggs produced.

name: Survivor Bonding
description: +10% villager speed, +1 Global Resolve.

name: Tanning Racks
description: +2 to Leather production (from gathering, farming, fishing, or production).

name: Tightened Belt
description: Travel cost on trade routes is reduced by 1. Doesn't apply to routes already in progress. This effect scales along with the quantity of goods exported.

name: Trade Hub
description: Gain 1 Reputation Point every time you sell goods worth 60 Amber, but fulfilling Orders awards 50% less Reputation.

name: Trade Logs
description: You can have 1 more trade route active at the same time. Traders will arrive 25% quicker.

name: Trade Negotiations
description: Trade routes are worth 1 more Amber. Doesn't apply to routes already in progress. This effect scales along with the quantity of goods exported.

name: Training Grounds
description: Gain +1 to Lizard Resolve for every 70 Training Gear produced.

name: Travel Rations
description: Increases the time between breaks for haulers by +50% and their carrying capacity by +5.

name: Urban Planning
description: For every 10 completed trade routes, all houses will have room for one more person.

name: Value Added Tax
description: Packs of trade goods are worth 25% more when sold through trade routes or directly to traders.

name: Vineyard Town
description: Gain +1 to Beaver Resolve for every 70 Wine produced.

name: Well-Rested Workers
description: Villagers with the leisure need fulfilled have a +33% chance of doubling their yields.

name: Without Restrictions
description: Villagers have a +10% higher chance of producing double yields, but consumption control is disabled.

name: Woodcutter's Prayer
description: +1 to Wood production. Lose all stored fuel upon picking this cornerstone.

name: Woodcutter's Song
description: For every 20 felled trees, Global Resolve is increased by 3 for 120 seconds.

name: Woodpecker Technique
description: Gain 2 Insects every time woodcutters cut down a tree during the Storm.

name: Work Safety Guide
description: Every villager with their need for education fulfilled increases global production speed by 5%.

name: Zhorg's Secret Ingredient
description: Gain 10 Skewers for every 10 Pickled Goods produced.

name: Amber
description: 10 Amber
